openai.summary: AEPD opened ex officio investigation (Apr 2023) into OpenAI/ChatGPT for possible GDPR violations relating to lawful basis and minors.

caixabank.summary: €6M AEPD fine (Jan 2021) on CaixaBank — at the time the largest Spanish GDPR fine — for unclear lawful basis and excessive client-data processing for marketing.

amazon.summary: AEPD fines on Amazon Spain entities for data-protection obligations.
